behaviors.reasoning: Static leakage detection on a prompt template is pure local validation logic.
Checking the fully assembled prompt requires real harness/template composition boundaries, beyond a single pure function.
Verifying that behavior comes from loaded plugin/skill context needs a real invocation path with plugin loading.
This requires a full AI agentic skill invocation workflow where behavior changes with SKILL.md changes under user-style prompts.
Ensuring raw output capture before parsing depends on test runner + parser + artifact wiring, not model quality itself.
Validating structured behavioral compliance against generated model output depends on one real model judgment/output step.
